message:
feat(widgets): Implement StatusLine widget and fix unicode title test

- Add StatusLine widget with left/center/right regions
- StatusItem variants: Text, Spinner, Progress, KeyHint, Spacer
- Custom separator support
- Fix unicode_title test to check for wide chars via width() instead of as_char()
- Mark StatusLine as essential (always renders)
- 13 unit tests for StatusLine

Closes bd-2dc

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
